info.name: SDIA for Service Mesh — Istio Validation
info.description: SDIA semantic routing — Service Mesh pattern. 24 endpoints. Full conversion chain assertions. Prior Art: IPCOM000277630D | DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18877636
